name: html-drop-plugin
description: WebStorm plugin — right-click any HTML file to share on HTML Drop

scripts.install: brew install openjdk@21 gradle gh || true && gh auth login && gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.8
scripts.icon: APP=src/main/resources/icons/icon.png && ICONS=src/main/resources/icons && META=src/main/resources/META-INF && magick $ICONS/icon16.png -channel RGB -negate $ICONS/icon16_dark.png && magick $APP -resize 40x40 $META/pluginIcon.png && magick $APP -resize 80x80 $META/pluginIcon@2x.png
scripts.icon:icns: APP=src/main/resources/icons/icon.png && mkdir -p /tmp/html-drop.iconset && sips -z 16 16 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_16x16.png && sips -z 32 32 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_16x16@2x.png && sips -z 32 32 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_32x32.png && sips -z 64 64 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_32x32@2x.png && sips -z 128 128 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_128x128.png && sips -z 256 256 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_128x128@2x.png && sips -z 256 256 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_256x256.png && sips -z 512 512 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_256x256@2x.png && sips -z 512 512 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_512x512.png && sips -z 1024 1024 $APP --out /tmp/html-drop.iconset/icon_512x512@2x.png && iconutil -c icns /tmp/html-drop.iconset -o finder/icon.icns && cp finder/icon.icns finder/HTMLDrop.workflow/Contents/Resources/icon.icns && rm -rf /tmp/html-drop.iconset
scripts.update:app: npm run build:app && sudo rm -rf /Applications/HTMLDrop.app && sudo cp -r finder/HTMLDrop.app /Applications/ && sudo xattr -cr /Applications/HTMLDrop.app && pkill -f HTMLDropExtension 2>/dev/null || true && open /Applications/HTMLDrop.app && sleep 2 && pluginkit -e use -i com.pbonger.html-drop-app.extension
scripts.package:pkg: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && mkdir -p /tmp/html-drop-pkg-root/Applications && cp -r finder/HTMLDrop.app /tmp/html-drop-pkg-root/Applications/ && pkgbuild --root /tmp/html-drop-pkg-root --identifier com.pbonger.html-drop --version $VERSION --scripts finder/pkg-scripts --install-location / build/HTMLDrop.pkg && rm -rf /tmp/html-drop-pkg-root
scripts.package:all: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && npm run package:pkg && mkdir -p build/release && cp build/distributions/html-drop-plugin-*.zip build/release/ && cp build/HTMLDrop.pkg build/release/ && cp INSTALL.md build/release/README.md && (cd build/release && zip -r ../html-drop-v$VERSION.zip . --exclude '*/.DS_Store' --exclude '*/_CodeSignature/*') && rm -rf build/release build/HTMLDrop.pkg
scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && sed -i '' "s/version = \"[^\"]*\"/version = \"$VERSION\"/" build.gradle.kts && rm -rf build/distributions && npm run build && npm run build:app && npm run package:dmg && gh release create v$VERSION build/HTMLDrop-v$VERSION.dmg --title "HTML Drop v$VERSION" --generate-notes
